沙歷：我們很難在冬季得到真正補強，因為已經很強了

拜仁慕尼黑體育主管沙歷咸美錫日前再次被問及冬季轉會的問題。

沙歷說道：「冬季轉會很難，因為球會不會在這個時候賣掉他們的好球員，補強也很困難，因為我們已經有很強的球員了，我們有一支出色的隊伍，板凳上有出色的年輕球員，隨著傷員回歸，事情在未來幾週會越來越好的。」

關於巴黎後衛蒙尼亞，沙歷表示：「請理解我不會對和其他球隊有合同的球員發表評論，我不談傳聞。」

Joachim Löw open to Thomas Müller and Mats Hummels Euro 2020 recalls
Last March, Joachim Löw stunned most of the football world when he announced that Jérôme Boateng, Thomas Müller, and Mats Hummels no longer had a future with the Germany national team.

Löw’s original aim was to build a younger squad, which left the trio of German veterans shocked and appalled, thinking they still had many fantastic years to offer.

Since then, Löw has stuck to his guns but it’s been impossible to ignore the statistics Müller has put up this season.

The 30-year-old has contributed five goals and 12 assists in 20 Bundesliga matches while Hummels has looked strong as Borussia Dortmund’s first-choice centre-back.

Now Löw is considering going back on his word.

“I still know what they can do and both are having strong performances this season,” he told Bild.

“I can rely on them as a possible option if we had problems shortly before the European Championships. But it is now too early to answer questions that have not yet been asked.”

The German national team will next be in action on 26 March when they travel to face Spain. Five days later, they will return to host Italy at the Max-Morlock-Stadion in Nürnberg.

quote.msg:
Joachim Löw open to Thomas Müller and Mats Hummels Euro 2020 recalls
Last March, Joachim Löw stunned most of the football world when he announced that Jérôme Boateng, Thomas Müller, and Mats Hummels no longer had a future with the Germany national team.

Löw’s original aim was to build a younger squad, which left the trio of German veterans shocked and appalled, thinking they still had many fantastic years to offer.

Since then, Löw has stuck to his guns but it’s been impossible to ignore the statistics Müller has put up this season.

The 30-year-old has contributed five goals and 12 assists in 20 Bundesliga matches while Hummels has looked strong as Borussia Dortmund’s first-choice centre-back.

Now Löw is considering going back on his word.

“I still know what they can do and both are having strong performances this season,” he told Bild.

“I can rely on them as a possible option if we had problems shortly before the European Championships. But it is now too early to answer questions that have not yet been asked.”

The German national team will next be in action on 26 March when they travel to face Spain. Five days later, they will return to host Italy at the Max-Morlock-Stadion in Nürnberg.

利物浦「埃及文明」鋒線穆罕默德沙拿、沙迪奧文尼、羅拔圖法明奴無堅不摧，但呢個夢幻組合面臨拆夥，英國《太陽報》爆料，指德甲豪門拜仁慕尼黑提出今夏用7500萬鎊(約7.5億港元)收購羅拔圖法明奴，接替即將32歲嘅射手羅拔利雲度夫斯基。
拜仁慕尼黑近年喺德甲優勢減弱，喺周一(10日)凌晨榜首大戰，主場僅同RB萊比錫打和0:0，繼續領先RB萊比錫1分。會方為延續霸業，已為下季組軍做準備，除咗力斟曼城24歲翼鋒利萊辛尼之外，依家想簽埋28歲嘅羅拔圖法明奴，打造一條更有活力新鋒線。
雖然羅拔圖法明奴唔似羅拔利雲度夫斯基係高產射手，但據悉拜仁高層好欣賞佢技術全面，屬於當今球壇最優秀進攻球員之一，而且呢位巴西國腳曾於2010至15年效力賀芬咸5季，對德甲非常熟悉，絕對冇適應問題，可以即食。
事實上，拜仁另一個收購目標利萊辛尼之前效力史浩克04，本身又係德國國腳，可見拜仁買人方針，好重視德甲經驗，所以願意付出7500萬鎊(約7.5億港元)搶購羅拔圖法明奴。
羅拔圖法明奴已經效力利物浦5季，捧過歐聯冠軍，如果今季贏埋英超冠軍，或者會考慮尋求新挑戰都唔奇。
